specific_question: How many customers participated in the customer satisfaction survey program offered by Elexion Automotive in the first half of 2025?
answer: In the first half of 2025, 10,890 Elexion Automotive customers took part in satisfaction surveys, providing input on their vehicle performance and service experience, according to an internal report from the sales and marketing department.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
